popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: 2nd wife, Katherine, dau of Richard de Houghton, Lord of Houghton in Lancashire.  In addition to Hugh and Roger, shown below, this couple had Thomas de Venables, Richard de Venables, who married Joane …

zh.of Chillington, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾林頓
zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Houghton於1308年出生在英國爾莫利頓時，她的父親Richard de Houghton30歲，母親Lady Sybil de Lea25歲。她於大約1327年與Hugh de Venables在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年在英國爾金德頓享年60歲。

zh-hans.of Chillington, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾林頓
zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Houghton于1308年出生在英国爾莫利頓时，她的父亲Richard de Houghton30岁，母亲Lady Sybil de Lea25岁。她于大约1327年与Hugh de Venables在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年在英国爾金德頓享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Houghton was born in 1308, in Mollington, Cheshire, England, her father, Richard de Houghton, was 30 and her mother, Lady Sybil de Lea, was 25. She married Hugh de Venables about 1327, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1368, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Houghton est née en 1308, à Mollington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Houghton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Sybil de Lea, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Venables environ 1327, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1368, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Houghton 1308 in Mollington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Houghton 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Sybil de Lea 25. Sie hat um 1327 in Cheshire, England Hugh de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1368 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Houghton è nata il nel 1308 nel Mollington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Houghton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Sybil de Lea, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Venables circa 1327, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1368, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Houghtonが1308年にイギリスチェシュアイアモリントンで生まれた時，父Richard de Houghtonは30歳，母Lady Sybil de Leaは25歳であった。約1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアでHugh de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Houghton(이)가 1308년 영국 체실르 모링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Houghton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sybil de Lea(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 영국 체실르에서 Hugh de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Houghton nasceu em 1308, em Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Houghton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sybil de Lea, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Venables aproximadamente 1327, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1368, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Houghton родилась в 1308 г. в местности моллингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Houghton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sybil de Lea, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Venables около 1327 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1368 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Houghton nació en 1308, en Mollington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Houghton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Sybil de Lea, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hugh de Venables aproximadamente 1327, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1368, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
